news.t: Tidal Financial Group Announces Reverse Stock Split for Defiance Daily Target 2X Short MSTR ETF (Ticker: SMST)
Defiance ETFs Announces Increase in Leverage for MSTX and SMST ETFs to 2x
Defiance ETFs Launches SMST: The First Short MicroStrategy ETF in the U.S.

holdings.infoBox: SMST is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 313.82%, US DOLLARS at 19.53%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 12.79%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 0.03%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at -6.77%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Short MSTR ETF (SMST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of MicroStrategy Incorporated (NYSE: MSTR), less fees and expenses. SMST was launched on Aug 20, 2024 and is issued by Defiance.
